name: base_theme
description: WordPress base theme (Parcel, theme.json, blocks). Custom-built starter by Bernhard Poppe.

scripts.watch: npm run sprite && chokidar "graphics/svgs/*.svg" -c "npm run sprite" & rm -rf .parcel-cache && rm -rf dist && parcel watch ./src/js/index.js ./src/scss/theme.scss ./src/scss/editor.scss
scripts.build: npm run favicons && npm run sprite && rm -rf .parcel-cache && rm -rf dist && parcel build ./src/js/index.js ./src/scss/theme.scss ./src/scss/editor.scss
scripts.deploy: npm run build && git add . && git commit -m newbuild && git push

author: Bernhard Poppe
